information_density.description: Controls how much detail the simulator shows. 'simple' = abstracted, relevant only. 'rich' = full raw output with hidden files, metadata, etc.

signal_noise_ratio.description: Controls output formatting quality. 'clean' = perfect formatting. 'noisy' = interleaved streams, ANSI codes, broken formatting.

determinism.description: Controls system reliability. 'idealized' = always succeeds. 'hostile' = flaky, timeouts, partial failures.

preset.description: Preset difficulty level. Overrides individual settings unless 'custom'.
